purpose: Global building-code reference index for BuildSetu agent. This is a routing/reference layer, not the full legal code text.
safetyBoundary: Agent must not claim final code compliance.
Agent must not copy full copyrighted code text.
Agent can mention likely code families and required authority/professional checks.
Final design, structure, MEP, fire, accessibility, FAR/FSI, setbacks, height, parking and approval must be checked by licensed professionals and local authorities.
Country, state/province/emirate, city/local authority, occupancy/use, height, plot zoning and project stage are required for code-sensitive answers.
codeQuestionBehavior: If user asks for exact clause/current legal compliance and location is missing, ask country + state/province/emirate + city/local authority.
If user asks for concept planning, proceed with assumptions and cite that local code verification is required.
If user asks for IS/IBC/Eurocode/NBC/NFPA/NEC/BS code, identify the likely code family but do not certify compliance.
For structure: provide concept and reference family only; no final calculations.
For electrical/plumbing/fire/MEP: provide concept and reference family only; no final sizing/certification.

India.defaultUnits: feet for client discussion; mm/m for drawings and engineering
nationalReferenceFamily: National Building Code of India / NBC context

electrical: IS 732 electrical wiring installation concept reference
National Electrical Code of India / SP 30 concept reference
fireLifeSafety: NBC fire and life safety context
plumbingPublicHealth: CPHEEO/local public health engineering references where applicable

Andhra Pradesh.authorityPattern: city municipal corporation / development authority / gram panchayat / local body as applicable
Andhra Pradesh.codePolicy: Use Indian national reference family plus state/city/local bylaws. Verify latest local FAR/FSI, setback, height, parking, fire and approval rules.
